name: design-an-interface
tagline: Spawns parallel sub-agents to generate and compare multiple radically different interface designs for a module, then helps synthesize the.
verdict: Clean, safe, concise process skill with a clear per-agent output format and good worked examples. Gaps: no guidance if a sub-agent invocation fails or returns malformed output, the sub-agent count ('3+') and constraint set are underspecified beyond 4 agents, and there is no exclusion guidance despite a fairly broad trigger.

highlights.summary: Line 3: 'Use when user wants to design an API, explore interface options, compare module shapes' — broad trigger with no NOT-for/exclusion text anywhere.
Line 26: 'Spawn 3+ sub-agents simultaneously using Task tool.' — no guidance for a failed, timed-out, or malformed sub-agent response.
Line 26: 'Spawn 3+ sub-agents' leaves the exact count undetermined, and only 4 example constraints are given for an open-ended agent count.
